prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TCFPKCB12IX15I-2PC-OPQ-2PACK-WSH-NCX Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: 2 Pack Thin Clear Flexible Plastic Kitchen Cutting Board 12 Inch x 15 Inch Description: Tired of your old, bulky cutting boards? Upgrade to this 2 Pack of Thin Clear Flexible Plastic Cutting Boards - a versatile and space-saving solution for every kitchen or crafting area.

These cutting boards are flexible and lightweight, allowing you to easily bend, roll, or funnel chopped ingredients straight into pots or bowls. Their thin design makes them easy to maneuver, perfect for fast-paced meal prep.

Designed for multi-purpose use, they’re not just for the kitchen. While they’re great for slicing fruits, vegetables, meats, and fish, they’re also ideal as a surface for arts and crafts, quilting, and other DIY projects.

Each board provides excellent countertop protection, preventing scratches, stains, and knife marks while keeping your prep area clean and tidy.

Cleanup is a breeze - these boards are dishwasher safe and can be quickly rolled up for storage. A built-in hole also lets you hang them for easy access.

With a generous 12" x 15" surface, these cutting boards offer plenty of room for all your prep work without taking up too much space. A smart, simple addition to any kitchen or workspace. Search Terms: best kitchen cutting board thin flexible clear plastic chopping mat non slip folding stove top oven food prep cutting boards for kitchen meal plastic chopping mat dish washer safe kitchen cutting mat home chef slicing food safe cutting board arts Features: - FLEXIBLE & LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Easily bend, roll, or funnel chopped ingredients with these ultra-flexible boards, perfect for quick meal prep or cleanup. - MULTI-PURPOSE USE - Ideal for cutting meat, fish, fruits, and veggies, and also great for crafting, quilting, or DIY projects. - COUNTERTOP PROTECTION - Shields surfaces from scratches, knife marks, and spills during food prep. - EASY TO CLEAN & STORE - Dishwasher safe and rolls up for compact storage; built-in hanging hole offers another storage option. - GENEROUS 12" X 15" SIZE - Spacious cutting surface fits most kitchen tasks while still being easy to handle and store. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 2-Pack 12x15 Clear Flexible Plastic Cutting Board

openai.item_name: Beille 2-pk 12" x 15" Clear Thin Flexible Plastic Cutting Board

anthropic.title_differentiation: Flexible And Lightweight, Dishwasher Safe, Multi-Purpose, Rolls For Storage, Countertop Protection

openai.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Rolls Up For Storage, Hanging Hole, Countertop Protection, Multi-Purpose For Crafts
